utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You said I was boring ... Ohh !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: When did I say you were boring ? !

emotion_cause.span: 2_When did I say you were boring ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh my God , I remember now ! We were playing chess !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Phoebe ! You and I have never played chess !

emotion_cause.span: 4_You and I have never played chess !
4_You and I have never played chess !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yes , remember that time on the frozen lake ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: We were playing chess , you said I was boring , and then you took off your energy mask and you were Cameron Diaz !

emotion_cause.span: 7_We were playing chess , you said I was boring

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , there is a chance this may have been a dream .

emotion_cause.span: 8_there is a chance this may have been a dream .
